title: Command Large Matte Black Double Hook, Indoor use - 1 Metal Large Hook and 1 Adhesive Strip - Hang Jackets, Purses, Handbags, Hats, Scarves, Dog Leads - Damage Free Hanging
features: ORGANISE DAMAGE-FREE - Say goodbye to holes, marks, or sticky residue on your walls, doors, cabinets, or cupboards; Command Hooks by 3M are easy to use and help keep your walls looking beautiful
NO TOOLS REQUIRED - Hang coats, hats, scarves, bags and more where you want without nails or a hammer
STRONG AND VERSATILE- Command Metal Hooks hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including painted walls, finished wood, glass, tile, metal, and other smooth surfaces
REMOVES CLEANLY- Reorganise when inspiration strikes; These wall hooks leave no sticky adhesive behind; Perfect to use inside cabinets, cupboards and wardrobes, in your apartment, home, and office
Pack contents: 1 Hook and 1 Large Strip, Color: Brushed Matte Black, Holding Power: 1,8kg
Easy to hang - no tools required
